ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Connect to a remote ${BACKEND_NAME} server instead of running one locally.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Base URL of the remote LightRAG server (e.g., http://192.168.1.100:9621).
ast.target: 远程 LightRAG 服务器的基础 URL（例如 http://192.168.1.100:9621）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional authentication key for the remote server.
ast.target: 远程服务器的可选认证密钥。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically start the server when Obsidian opens.
ast.target: 在 Obsidian 打开时自动启动服务器。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: lightrag-server 可执行文件的路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folder for the graph database and index files.
ast.target: 用于存储图数据库和索引文件的文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select the model used for vectorizing your notes, (must match the dimensions used during ingestion).
ast.target: 选择用于向量化笔记的模型（必须与导入时使用的维度匹配）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, the AI will add footnotes like [1] linking to sources.
ast.target: 如果启用，AI 将添加类似 [1] 的脚注链接到来源。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vault-relative folder to watch for changes. When set, deleting or renaming a note removes it from the graph automatically, and saving a note re-indexes it after 5 s of inactivity. Leave empty to disable. Only files you have previously ingested are affected.
ast.target: 用于监视更改的、相对于保险库的文件夹。设置后，删除或重命名笔记会自动将其从图中移除，保存笔记后会在 5 秒不活动后重新索引。留空则禁用。仅影响您之前已导入的文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vault-relative folder with representative notes to analyze (e.g. Main/Memories).
ast.target: 包含用于分析的代表性笔记的、相对于保险库的文件夹（例如 Main/Memories）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Define the "categories" of your field of knowledge.
ast.target: 定义您知识领域的“类别”。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Service to re-order results. Use "custom" for local servers.
ast.target: 用于重新排序结果的服务。本地服务器请使用“custom”。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Leave empty for local open servers.
ast.target: 本地开放服务器请留空。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The full URL to the rerank endpoint (e.g. http://localhost:8000/v1/rerank).
ast.target: 重排序端点的完整 URL（例如 http://localhost:8000/v1/rerank）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: You *must* restart the server after changing any setting above to apply the new configuration (.env).
ast.target: 您*必须*在更改上述任何设置后重启服务器，以应用新的配置（.env）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Review the generated .env file, tweak advanced parameters, and restart the server.
ast.target: 检查生成的 .env 文件，调整高级参数，然后重启服务器。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The name of the MCP server

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
JSON configuration that defines how to run the MCP server. Format must include:
- "command": The executable name (e.g., "npx", "node")
- "args": (Optional) Array of command-line arguments
- "env": (Optional) Key-value pairs of environment variables
ast.target:
定义如何运行 MCP 服务器的 JSON 配置。格式必须包含：
- "command": 可执行文件名称（例如 "npx"、"node"）
- "args": （可选）命令行参数数组
- "env": （可选）环境变量键值对

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Choose the model you want to use for chat.
ast.target: 选择您想用于聊天的模型。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Choose the model you want to use for apply feature.
ast.target: 选择您想用于应用功能的模型。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: This prompt will be added to the beginning of every chat.
ast.target: 此提示将添加到每次聊天的开头。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Automatically include the content of your current file in chats.
ast.target: 自动在聊天中包含当前文件的内容。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Allow the AI to use MCP tools.
ast.target: 允许 AI 使用 MCP 工具。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Maximum number of consecutive tool calls that can be made automatically without user confirmation. Higher values can significantly increase costs as each tool call consumes additional tokens.
ast.target: 无需用户确认即可自动进行的最大连续工具调用次数。较高的值会显著增加成本，因为每次工具调用都会消耗额外的令牌。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Reset all settings to default values
ast.target: 将所有设置重置为默认值

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Choose an ID to identify this model in your settings. This is just for your reference.
ast.target: 选择一个 ID 来在设置中标识此模型。这仅供您参考。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Choose how complex the system prompt should be. Select "simple" for small models that ignore user questions and just repeat back instructions.
ast.target: 选择系统提示的复杂程度。对于忽略用户问题并仅重复指令的小型模型，请选择“简单”。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Enable reasoning for the model. Available for o-series models (e.g., o3, o4-mini) and GPT-5 models.
ast.target: 为模型启用推理。适用于 o 系列模型（例如 o3、o4-mini）和 GPT-5 模型。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Controls how much thinking the model does before responding. Default is "medium".
ast.target: 控制模型在响应前进行多少思考。默认为“中等”。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Enable extended thinking for Claude. Available for Claude Sonnet 3.7+ and Claude Opus 4.0+.
ast.target: 为 Claude 启用扩展思考。适用于 Claude Sonnet 3.7+ 和 Claude Opus 4.0+。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The maximum number of tokens that Claude can use for thinking. Must be at least 1024.
ast.target: Claude 可用于思考的最大令牌数。必须至少为 1024。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Determines how much search context is retrieved for the model. Choose "low" for minimal context and lower costs, "medium" for a balanced approach, or "high" for maximum context at higher cost. Default is "low".
ast.target: 确定为模型检索多少搜索上下文。选择“低”以获取最少的上下文和较低的成本，“中”以获得平衡的方法，或“高”以获取最大上下文但成本较高。默认为“低”。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Choose the embedding model used for local RAG (smart context search)
ast.target: 选择用于本地 RAG（智能上下文搜索）的嵌入模型

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Choose an ID to identify this provider in your settings. This is just for your reference.
ast.target: 选择一个 ID 来在设置中标识此提供商。这仅供您参考。

ast.name: text

ast.target: 在 Ko-fi 上支持 Neural Composer
